description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge, featuring a spacious driveway with a double garage at the front. The house has a dark, hipped roof and a light-colored facade with large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entrance is sheltered by a covered porch supported by columns, and the property includes a paved walkway leading to the main door. The backyard is landscaped with a patio area, a small pool, and a blossoming tree, offering outdoor relaxation spaces. The side yard contains additional greenery and a hammock, enhancing the residential comfort. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with symmetrical window placement and a balanced architectural form.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hipped roof, large windows, double garage, and landscaped yard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with covered porch, driveway, and trimmed hedge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard patio and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a patio, pool, blossoming tree, and rear facade windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, side windows, and a hammock area in the yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, main door centered, steps leading up from driveway, minimal decorative elements
